title: 2014 2015 Studio Khara Calendar
wikitext:
[]: 2014-2015 Studio Khara Calendar             Quote Post by TMBounty_Hunter » Fri Oct 18, 2013 9:23 am Now that the piecemeal announcements are done and we have the complete artist list I think this warrants its own topic. http://www.evastore.jp/pc/article/Z0000601.html So the 29 people contributing 28 illustrations are: 2014 鶴巻和哉 - Kazuya Tsurumaki 高倉武史 - Takeshi Takakura 摩砂雪 - Masayuki 松原秀典 - Hidenori Matsubara 市古斉史 - Masashi Ichifuru (TGB Design) コヤマシゲト - Koyama Shigeto 松井祐亮（カラーデジタル部） - Yusuke Matsui 増尾昭一 - Shoichi Masuo 吉崎響 x 鈴木陽太（flapper3） - Hibiki Yoshizaki x Yota Suzuki 加藤浩（ととにゃん） - Hiroshi Kato (Totonyan) すしお - Sushio 亀田祥倫 - Yoshimichi Kameda 山下いくと - Ikuto Yamashita 前田真宏 - Mahiro Maeda 2015 沖浦啓之 - Hiroyuki Okiura 平松禎史 - Tadashi Hiramatsu 林明美 - Akemi Hayashi 中村章子 - Shouko Nakamura 伊藤秀次 - Hidetsugu Itou 柴田由香 - Yuka Shibata 岩里昌則（カラーデジタル部） - Masanori Iwasato 西尾鉄也 - Tetsuya Nishio 樋口真嗣 - Shinji Higuchi 串田達也 - Tatsuya Kushida 本間晃 - Akira Honma 今石洋之 - Hiroyuki Imaishi 安野モヨコ - Moyoko Anno 本田雄 - Takeshi Honda This is a very exciting list. Also almost everyone on it is credited with work on Q. December 2013 release date.

[]:             Quote Post by ElMariachi » Fri Oct 18, 2013 9:26 am Will we have some previews of the illustrations in it or do we'll have to wait for the proper release?

[]:             Quote Post by TMBounty_Hunter » Fri Oct 25, 2013 3:06 pm I doubt we'll see them all before it's out but I'm sure they'll release a few to tease people and intice them to buy the whole thing. ----------------------------EDIT---------------------------- And here you go the first tease I suspect that Asuka one is Imaishi's doing. http://www.evastore.jp/pc/article/Z0000601.html

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Fri Oct 25, 2013 3:27 pm *Squints* ...I really can't tell what's happening there. The one above looks like a pencil or manga sketch of Kaworu and Shinji.

[]:             Quote Post by TMBounty_Hunter » Fri Oct 25, 2013 3:33 pm The Imaishi pic looks like Asuka at the beach with tape from her plugsuit used to supplement the swimsuit. Eva-02'gamma and its floatation vest shenanigans in the background.

[]:             Quote Post by ElMariachi » Fri Oct 25, 2013 3:36 pm ^ Yep, and there seem to also be a power cord at Asuka's feet, and she wears a red cap with the two buttons on her cat-eared cap in 3.0.

[]:             Quote Post by Warren Peace » Sat Oct 26, 2013 12:32 am Asuka sitting on a hotdog while wearing a doughnut! "I know you think of me as food." Anno's Freudianism strikes again!

[]:             Quote Post by TMBounty_Hunter » Fri Nov 01, 2013 9:52 am

[]:             Quote Post by Giji Shinka » Fri Nov 01, 2013 9:56 am

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Fri Nov 01, 2013 10:09 am Of course the Masayuki one is Rei underwater...

[]:             Quote Post by Chroma » Fri Nov 01, 2013 10:47 am That Rei image with the fire and EVAs in the back is really nice. Would these be possible to buy and shipped to America, or will I have no way of procuring this?

[]:             Quote Post by Dataprime » Fri Nov 01, 2013 10:54 am Oh, I like dis

[]:             Quote Post by TMBounty_Hunter » Fri Nov 01, 2013 11:02 am At the very least the calendar is available through amazon.co.jp www.amazon.co.jp/dp/B00FJOLWZE/ They do ship internationally. Also whethere or not you can procure something doesn't depend ont he system but how far you're willing to go

[]:             Quote Post by AR-99 » Fri Nov 01, 2013 11:13 am Maybe there'll be a price drop after 2014 starts. It's a 2 year calendar but 5,400Y is still JList doesn't have this unfortunately but they do have the Eva calendar.

[]:             Quote Post by TheFriskyIan » Fri Nov 01, 2013 11:27 am TMBounty_Hunter wrote:

[]:             Quote Post by Nuclear Lunchbox » Fri Nov 01, 2013 12:18 pm Oh, this is impressive. I think I know what I'm getting for Jewish Christmas this year...

[]:             Quote Post by Kendrix » Fri Nov 01, 2013 3:57 pm The Rei and Kaworu/Shinji/weird frames ones look really awesome... I'm probably most curious for the one drawn by Anno's wife. Anxiously waiting for scans of this and the Honda one!

[]:             Quote Post by TMBounty_Hunter » Fri Nov 01, 2013 4:18 pm AR-99 wrote: It's a 2 year calendar but 5,400Y is still

[]:             Quote Post by AR-99 » Fri Nov 01, 2013 6:08 pm Every little bit counts, doesn't it. More ¥ for the [s:38iqraji]film budget[/s:38iqraji], [s:38iqraji]Anno[/s:38iqraji], [s:38iqraji]khara[/s:38iqraji], whoever. I definitely could stretch that 5,400¥ with some used Eva goods off Surugaya or YJA.

[]:             Quote Post by Chroma » Fri Nov 01, 2013 11:51 pm TMBounty_Hunter wrote: At the very least the calendar is available through amazon.co.jp They do ship internationally.
